options.content:
# Payment KPIs
Payment volume, status, success rates, and revenue breakdown

targets.rawSql: SELECT 'OK' AS connection, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rides)::text AS rides, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM driver_earnings)::text AS earnings

SELECT m.method, COALESCE(SUM(r."totalFare"), 0)::double precision AS volume FROM (VALUES ('CASH'), ('CARD'), ('UPI'), ('WALLET')) AS m(method) LEFT JOIN rides r ON r."paymentMethod"::text = m.method AND r.status = 'RIDE_COMPLETED' GROUP BY m.method ORDER BY volume DESC

SELECT s.status, COALESCE(COUNT(r.id), 0)::double precision AS count FROM (VALUES ('PENDING'), ('PAID'), ('FAILED'), ('REFUNDED')) AS s(status) LEFT JOIN rides r ON r."paymentStatus"::text = s.status GROUP BY s.status ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT m.method, COUNT(r.id) AS total, COUNT(r.id) FILTER (WHERE r."paymentStatus" = 'PAID') AS successful, COUNT(r.id) FILTER (WHERE r."paymentStatus" = 'FAILED') AS failed, COUNT(r.id) FILTER (WHERE r."paymentStatus" = 'REFUNDED') AS refunded, ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(r.id) FILTER (WHERE r."paymentStatus" = 'PAID') / NULLIF(COUNT(r.id), 0), 2) AS success_rate_pct FROM (VALUES ('CASH'), ('CARD'), ('UPI'), ('WALLET')) AS m(method) LEFT JOIN rides r ON r."paymentMethod"::text = m.method AND (r.status = 'RIDE_COMPLETED' OR r.status = 'CANCELLED') GROUP BY m.method ORDER BY success_rate_pct DESC NULLS LAST, m.method

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', "completedAt") AS time, SUM("totalFare")::double precision AS volume FROM rides WHERE "paymentStatus" = 'PAID' AND "completedAt" >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' AND "completedAt" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('day', "completedAt") ORDER BY time

SELECT month, COALESCE(transaction_count, 0) AS transaction_count, ROUND(COALESCE(monthly_volume, 0)::numeric, 2) AS monthly_volume, ROUND(COALESCE(prev_month, 0)::numeric, 2) AS prev_month, COALESCE(mom_growth_pct, 0) AS mom_growth_pct FROM (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "completedAt") AS month, COUNT(*) AS transaction_count, SUM("totalFare") AS monthly_volume, LAG(SUM("totalFare")) OVER (ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "completedAt")) AS prev_month, ROUND(100.0 * (SUM("totalFare") - LAG(SUM("totalFare")) OVER (ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "completedAt"))) / NULLIF(LAG(SUM("totalFare")) OVER (ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "completedAt")), 0), 2) AS mom_growth_pct FROM rides WHERE "paymentStatus" = 'PAID' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "completedAt")) x UNION ALL SELECT NULL AS month, 0, 0, 0, 0 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM rides WHERE "paymentStatus" = 'PAID' LIMIT 1) ORDER BY month DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 12

SELECT month, COALESCE(refund_count, 0) AS refund_count, ROUND(COALESCE(refund_amount, 0)::numeric, 2) AS refund_amount, ROUND(COALESCE(avg_refund, 0)::numeric, 2) AS avg_refund FROM (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "cancelledAt") AS month, COUNT(*) AS refund_count, SUM("totalFare") AS refund_amount, AVG("totalFare") AS avg_refund FROM rides WHERE "paymentStatus" = 'REFUNDED' AND "cancelledAt" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "cancelledAt")) x UNION ALL SELECT NULL, 0, 0, 0 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM rides WHERE "paymentStatus" = 'REFUNDED' LIMIT 1) ORDER BY month DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 12

SELECT time, metric, COALESCE(value, 0)::double precision AS value FROM (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "completedAt") AS time, "paymentMethod"::text AS metric, COUNT(*)::double precision AS value FROM rides WHERE "paymentStatus" = 'PAID' AND "completedAt" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1, 2) x UNION ALL SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW()) AS time, m.method AS metric, 0::double precision AS value FROM (VALUES ('CASH'), ('CARD'), ('UPI'), ('WALLET')) AS m(method) WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM rides WHERE "paymentStatus" = 'PAID' AND "completedAt" IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1) ORDER BY time

SELECT m.method, COUNT(r.id) AS failed_count, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(r."totalFare"), 0)::numeric, 2) AS failed_amount FROM (VALUES ('CASH'), ('CARD'), ('UPI'), ('WALLET')) AS m(method) LEFT JOIN rides r ON r."paymentMethod"::text = m.method AND r."paymentStatus" = 'FAILED' GROUP BY m.method ORDER BY failed_count DESC

SELECT COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM driver_earnings), 0)::bigint AS payout_count, ROUND(COALESCE((SELECT SUM("netAmount") FROM driver_earnings), 0)::numeric, 2) AS total_amount, ROUND(COALESCE((SELECT SUM("commission") FROM driver_earnings), 0)::numeric, 2) AS total_commission, ROUND(COALESCE((SELECT AVG("netAmount") FROM driver_earnings), 0)::numeric, 2) AS avg_payout FROM (SELECT 1) t

SELECT h.hour::int, COALESCE(COUNT(r.id), 0) AS transaction_count, ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(r."totalFare"), 0)::numeric, 2) AS avg_transaction, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(r."totalFare"), 0)::numeric, 2) AS total_volume FROM generate_series(0, 23) AS h(hour) LEFT JOIN rides r ON EXTRACT(HOUR FROM r."completedAt") = h.hour AND r."paymentStatus" = 'PAID' AND r."completedAt" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY h.hour ORDER BY h.hour

panels.title: 13. Avg Transaction Value by Hour of Day

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE((SELECT SUM("baseFare") FROM rides WHERE status = 'RIDE_COMPLETED' AND "paymentStatus" = 'PAID'), 0)::numeric, 2) AS total_base_fare, ROUND(COALESCE((SELECT SUM("distanceFare") FROM rides WHERE status = 'RIDE_COMPLETED' AND "paymentStatus" = 'PAID'), 0)::numeric, 2) AS total_distance_fare, ROUND(COALESCE((SELECT SUM("timeFare") FROM rides WHERE status = 'RIDE_COMPLETED' AND "paymentStatus" = 'PAID'), 0)::numeric, 2) AS total_time_fare, ROUND(COALESCE((SELECT SUM("surgeFare") FROM rides WHERE status = 'RIDE_COMPLETED' AND "paymentStatus" = 'PAID'), 0)::numeric, 2) AS total_surge, ROUND(COALESCE((SELECT SUM("totalFare") FROM rides WHERE status = 'RIDE_COMPLETED' AND "paymentStatus" = 'PAID'), 0)::numeric, 2) AS net_revenue, COALESCE(ROUND(100.0 * (SELECT SUM("baseFare") FROM rides WHERE status = 'RIDE_COMPLETED' AND "paymentStatus" = 'PAID') / NULLIF((SELECT SUM("totalFare") FROM rides WHERE status = 'RIDE_COMPLETED' AND "paymentStatus" = 'PAID'), 0), 2), 0) AS base_pct, COALESCE(ROUND(100.0 * (SELECT SUM("distanceFare") FROM rides WHERE status = 'RIDE_COMPLETED' AND "paymentStatus" = 'PAID') / NULLIF((SELECT SUM("totalFare") FROM rides WHERE status = 'RIDE_COMPLETED' AND "paymentStatus" = 'PAID'), 0), 2), 0) AS distance_pct, COALESCE(ROUND(100.0 * (SELECT SUM("timeFare") FROM rides WHERE status = 'RIDE_COMPLETED' AND "paymentStatus" = 'PAID') / NULLIF((SELECT SUM("totalFare") FROM rides WHERE status = 'RIDE_COMPLETED' AND "paymentStatus" = 'PAID'), 0), 2), 0) AS time_pct, COALESCE(ROUND(100.0 * (SELECT SUM("surgeFare") FROM rides WHERE status = 'RIDE_COMPLETED' AND "paymentStatus" = 'PAID') / NULLIF((SELECT SUM("totalFare") FROM rides WHERE status = 'RIDE_COMPLETED' AND "paymentStatus" = 'PAID'), 0), 2), 0) AS surge_pct FROM (SELECT 1) t
